internalAudit.title: Internal Audit
internalAudit.headline: Independently evaluates the harness without joining the project team.

game-development.label: Game Development
game-development.headline: Build and ship a coherent playable experience.

management.title: Game Director
management.headline: Owns the creative vision, player experience, priorities, scope, and final direction decisions.

operations.title: Producer
operations.headline: Turns the vision into an executable production plan and owns coordination, risk, integration, and delivery evidence.

consultants.title: Art Director
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts the visual language and production-quality bar.
readinessRequirements: Visual intent, references, production constraints, and acceptance criteria are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative source and runtime visuals prove the approved direction at the intended viewing context.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects visual-direction work inside the approved art boundary.

consultants.title: Lead Game Designer
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts player-facing systems, rules, progression, and interaction quality.
readinessRequirements: Player intent, rules, controls, failure states, balance assumptions, and playable acceptance are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: A representative playable slice and observed behavior demonstrate the intended player experience.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects game-design behavior inside the approved design boundary.

consultants.title: Technical Director
consultants.headline: Defines technical constraints and accepts architecture, performance, and production feasibility.
readinessRequirements: Runtime targets, architecture constraints, budgets, platform risks, and technical evidence are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Runtime captures, profiles, and integration checks demonstrate technical feasibility on target conditions.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects technical-direction work inside the approved technology boundary.

consultants.title: Narrative Director
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts story, world, character, tone, and narrative delivery.
readinessRequirements: Narrative purpose, canon, tone, delivery context, dependencies, and approval criteria are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative in-context narrative content demonstrates continuity, tone, and delivery quality.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects narrative work inside the approved story boundary.

consultants.title: Audio Director
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts music, sound, voice, mix, and interactive-audio direction.
readinessRequirements: Audio intent, references, runtime triggers, mix priorities, budgets, and acceptance context are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: In-context runtime audio proves the intended timing, hierarchy, mix, and emotional result.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects audio work inside the approved sound boundary.

consultants.title: QA Lead
consultants.headline: Defines risk-based test strategy and accepts release-quality evidence for the game.
readinessRequirements: Supported platforms, risk areas, test environments, severity policy, and release criteria are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Traceable test results, defect disposition, and representative playthrough evidence cover release risks.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects quality evidence inside the approved QA boundary.

contractorBench.headline: Implements bounded gameplay, systems, engine, UI, or networking work.
Produces bounded art, animation, narrative, audio, level, or technical-content deliverables.
Runs bounded playtests, diagnostics, balancing analysis, and reproducible verification.

software-product.label: Software Product
software-product.headline: Build and operate a useful, reliable software product.

management.title: Product Manager
management.headline: Owns user outcomes, product priorities, scope, readiness, and release decisions.

operations.title: Engineering Manager
operations.headline: Owns executable delivery, technical coordination, Contractor dispatch, integration, and verification.

consultants.title: Product Designer
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts coherent user journeys, interaction behavior, and interface quality.
readinessRequirements: Target users, journey, states, content, accessibility needs, and interaction acceptance are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative flows at target viewports demonstrate usable, coherent, and accessible behavior.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects product-design work inside the approved design boundary.

consultants.title: Principal Engineer
consultants.headline: Defines consequential technical direction and accepts architecture inside an approved boundary.
readinessRequirements: System boundaries, invariants, constraints, failure modes, migration path, and decision evidence are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative interfaces, tests, operational behavior, and alternatives support the technical decision.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects architecture inside the approved technical boundary.

consultants.title: Security Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts security requirements, threat controls, and risk evidence.
readinessRequirements: Assets, actors, trust boundaries, threats, controls, data exposure, and residual-risk owner are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Threat analysis, control tests, and residual-risk evidence cover the approved security boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects security evidence inside the approved security boundary.

consultants.title: Platform/SRE Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts reliability, operability, platform, and incident-readiness standards.
readinessRequirements: Service objectives, load, failure modes, observability, recovery, ownership, and rollout controls are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Operational checks, failure exercises, telemetry, and recovery evidence cover the service boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects reliability evidence inside the approved platform boundary.

consultants.title: Data Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts data contracts, quality, lineage, governance, and analytical correctness.
readinessRequirements: Sources, contracts, semantics, quality thresholds, lineage, access, retention, and owners are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative data checks, lineage, reconciliation, and consumer evidence prove the approved contract.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects data work inside the approved data boundary.

consultants.title: Accessibility Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts inclusive interaction requirements and accessibility evidence.
readinessRequirements: Affected users, standards, input modes, assistive technologies, content, and severity thresholds are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Keyboard, screen-reader, contrast, zoom, motion, and representative user-flow evidence cover the boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects accessibility work inside the approved accessibility boundary.

consultants.title: QA Lead
consultants.headline: Defines risk-based test strategy and accepts product-quality evidence.
readinessRequirements: Supported environments, quality risks, severity policy, test layers, and release criteria are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Traceable automated, exploratory, compatibility, and regression evidence covers product risks.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects quality evidence inside the approved QA boundary.

contractorBench.headline: Implements bounded frontend, backend, mobile, API, or integration work.
Implements bounded infrastructure, reliability, data, migration, or operational work.
Runs bounded tests, diagnostics, research, review, and reproducible verification.

business-operations.label: Business Operations
business-operations.headline: Design and operate a measurable, controlled business program.

management.title: Program Director
management.headline: Owns program outcomes, priorities, scope, stakeholder decisions, and consequential approvals.

operations.title: Operations Manager
operations.headline: Turns direction into an executable operating plan and owns coordination, implementation, controls, and evidence.

consultants.title: Compliance Officer
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts compliance requirements and control evidence.
readinessRequirements: Applicable obligations, scope, controls, accountable owners, exceptions, and approval route are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Traceable controls, records, exceptions, and review evidence demonstrate compliance in scope.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects compliance evidence inside the approved compliance boundary.

consultants.title: Financial Controller
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts financial-control, accounting, reconciliation, and reporting evidence.
readinessRequirements: Accounting basis, source records, materiality, controls, owners, approvals, and reconciliation are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Reconciled records, control evidence, exceptions, and signed review support the financial result.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects financial-control evidence inside the approved finance boundary.

consultants.title: Legal Counsel
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts legal requirements, rights, obligations, and legal-risk treatment.
readinessRequirements: Jurisdiction, parties, facts, rights, obligations, assumptions, risk owner, and required legal decisions are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Controlling sources, reviewed terms, unresolved risks, and recorded legal decisions cover the approved boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects legal sufficiency inside the approved legal boundary.

consultants.title: Risk Manager
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts risk assessment, treatment, ownership, and monitoring evidence.
readinessRequirements: Risk taxonomy, likelihood, impact, controls, treatment, appetite, owners, and escalation are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Current risk records, control evidence, residual-risk decisions, and monitoring cover the approved boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects risk evidence inside the approved risk boundary.

consultants.title: People Operations Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts people-process, workforce, and employee-experience requirements.
readinessRequirements: Affected people, policy basis, privacy, fairness, consultation, support, ownership, and approval are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Representative process, communication, consent or consultation, and outcome evidence cover affected people.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects people-operations work inside the approved people boundary.

consultants.title: Data Governance Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts business-data ownership, quality, access, lineage, and retention controls.
readinessRequirements: Data owners, purpose, classification, quality, access, lineage, retention, and deletion controls are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Inventories, lineage, access records, quality checks, and retention evidence cover governed data.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects governance evidence inside the approved data boundary.

consultants.title: Change Manager
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts adoption, communication, training, readiness, and transition evidence.
readinessRequirements: Affected groups, change impacts, sponsors, communications, training, support, and adoption measures are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Readiness, communication, training, feedback, adoption, and transition evidence cover affected groups.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects organizational-readiness evidence inside the approved change boundary.

consultants.title: Quality Manager
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts process-quality, control, auditability, and continuous-improvement evidence.
readinessRequirements: Service standards, process controls, measures, exceptions, owners, audit trail, and improvement loop are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Process records, control tests, service measures, exceptions, and corrective actions cover the boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects quality evidence inside the approved quality boundary.

contractorBench.headline: Performs bounded process analysis, policy drafting, control design, or service-design work.
Implements bounded workflow, tooling, data, documentation, training, or rollout work.
Runs bounded research, reconciliation, testing, audit support, and operational verification.

research.label: Research
research.headline: Produce credible, reproducible evidence and useful knowledge.

management.title: Principal Investigator
management.headline: Owns the research question, scientific direction, priorities, scope, integrity, and consequential approvals.

operations.title: Research Program Manager
operations.headline: Turns the research direction into an executable program and owns coordination, resources, dependencies, evidence, and delivery.

consultants.title: Research Methodologist
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts methodological fit, validity, study design, and evidential limits.
readinessRequirements: Research question, design, population or corpus, measures, bias controls, analysis, and validity limits are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Protocol, materials, analysis plan, deviations, and validity evidence support the approved method.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects methodological sufficiency inside the approved methods boundary.

consultants.title: Statistician
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts statistical design, assumptions, analysis, uncertainty, and reporting.
readinessRequirements: Estimand, variables, sampling, power, assumptions, analysis, missing data, and multiplicity are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Reproducible analysis, diagnostics, uncertainty, sensitivity checks, and transparent reporting support conclusions.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects statistical evidence inside the approved analysis boundary.

consultants.title: Research Ethics Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts participant, consent, welfare, privacy, and ethics-review requirements.
readinessRequirements: Participants, risks, benefits, consent, privacy, safeguards, compensation, and ethics approvals are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Approved materials, consent evidence, safeguards, deviations, and incident records cover the ethical boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects ethics readiness inside the approved ethics boundary.

consultants.title: Data Steward
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts research-data quality, metadata, access, preservation, and sharing controls.
readinessRequirements: Data sources, ownership, metadata, quality, access, retention, preservation, sharing, and deletion are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Data-management records, metadata, quality checks, access logs, and preservation evidence cover the boundary.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects stewardship evidence inside the approved data boundary.

consultants.title: Reproducibility Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts reproducible workflows, provenance, materials, environments, and replication evidence.
readinessRequirements: Inputs, provenance, environment, workflow, seeds, versions, artifacts, and permissible sharing are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Independent reruns, manifests, provenance, environments, and documented deviations reproduce the claimed result.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects reproducibility evidence inside the approved reproducibility boundary.

consultants.title: Subject-Matter Expert
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts domain assumptions, terminology, interpretation, and practical relevance.
readinessRequirements: Subject boundary, accepted concepts, disputed assumptions, sources, stakeholders, and interpretation criteria are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Controlling domain sources and representative interpretation evidence support claims in scope.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects domain interpretation inside the approved subject boundary.

consultants.title: Computational Research Lead
consultants.headline: Defines and accepts computational methods, software, infrastructure, performance, and technical validity.
readinessRequirements: Models, algorithms, data flow, environments, numerical assumptions, scale, validation, and failure modes are explicit.
evidenceRequirements: Reproducible code, environments, benchmarks, diagnostics, and validation evidence support computational claims.
consultants.acceptanceAuthority: Accepts or rejects computational-method evidence inside the approved technical boundary.

contractorBench.headline: Performs bounded literature, source, corpus, interview, or evidence-synthesis work.
Performs bounded collection, cleaning, analysis, modeling, experiment, or computational work.
Performs bounded replication, provenance, visualization, documentation, and verification work.
